prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Absolutely! Here’s your pep talk:

**"You’ve got this. That task you’ve been putting off? It’s not as big as your courage. Prove to yourself that you can tackle the hard thing. Start small—just one step—and watch how momentum kicks in. Every procrastinated minute just makes the challenge loom larger in your mind. But you? You’re ready. Now’s your time to show up, dive in, and break through. The relief and pride you’ll feel afterward will be worth every second. So take a deep breath, lean into this, and let’s conquer it—because you’re capable of more than you think!"**

Go crush it! 💪✨
